news.headline: 2024 Crossroads Summit offers insight on election's macroeconomic impact. Trump plans 15% corporate tax, Harris plans 28%. Uncertainty on deficit.
news.summary: The 2024 Crossroads Summit is being highlighted as an event for people concerned about how the next election may impact their financial well-being or global affairs due to the potential chaos that can lead to opportunities. The political climate is currently highly divisive and the two contrasting candidates, Republican Donald Trump and Democrat Kamala Harris, have very different corporate tax policies. Trump aims to reduce the corporate tax rate from 21% to 15% while Harris plans to raise it to 28%. The impact of these policies on corporate profits, stock market, GDP, and federal budget deficit remains uncertain. According to the Penn Wharton Budget Model, both candidates' policies are projected to increase the federal budget deficit.

news.headline: Inhibikase Therapeutics closes $110M financing, potential $275M; advancing IkT-001Pro for PAH treatment in women aged 30-60.
news.summary: A new molecular entity, IkT-001Pro, is being developed as the first oral, potentially disease-modifying treatment for a rapidly fatal illness that mainly affects women aged 30 to 60. Inhibikase Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: IKT) announced the completion of a private placement, raising about $110 million through the sale of common stock and warrants. The total financing could reach approximately $275 million upon the full exercise of the warrants. The funds will support the Phase 2b ‘702’ trial for Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension (PAH) and general corporate operations, emphasizing the company's focus on developing protein kinase inhibitors to tackle Cardiopulmonary and Neurodegenerative diseases through Abelson Tyrosine Kinase inhibition. The announcement was made jointly from BOSTON and ATLANTA on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Nucleus RadioPharma expands with 2 new facilities totaling 100,000 sq ft in Arizona and Pennsylvania, boosting radiopharmaceutical capabilities.
news.summary: Nucleus RadioPharma revealed plans for the construction of cutting-edge facilities in Mesa, Arizona, and Springhouse, Pennsylvania, spanning an extensive area of more than 100,000 square feet. These state-of-the-art establishments mark a significant milestone as they integrate research, development, and commercial production functions within a single location, providing immense time and scope benefits for Nucleus' affiliates. The launch of these pioneering facilities signifies a leap for the radiopharmaceutical sector, facilitating innovative isotope applications and offering extensive production capacities to cater to a broad range of needs.

news.headline: Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN) partners with GAF to offer customers access to order GAF QuickMeasure™ reports through Beacon PRO+®.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, Beacon, a top publicly traded wholesale distributor focusing on roofing, waterproofing, and related exterior products, has revealed a new collaboration with GAF. This partnership allows Beacon customers to easily request GAF QuickMeasure™ reports through Beacon PRO+®, a cutting-edge digital platform. Through the integration with GAF, contractors now have the opportunity to streamline the estimation process by ordering QuickMeasure reports, providing them with a reliable solution for accurate measurements. Become part of Beacon and GAF's initiative by utilizing this feature to enhance efficiency and precision in your projects.

news.headline: Heitman acquires self-storage site in Galway, Ireland for U-Store It, strengthening presence as leading provider.
news.summary: In London, Heitman LLC disclosed their acquisition of a self-storage site in Galway, Ireland. This move bolsters their U-Store It business, solidifying its position as the top self-storage provider in the country. The investment aligns with Heitman’s strategy of global core plus focus. This decision showcases confidence in the European self-storage sector and the expanding prospects in Ireland.

news.headline: Kiavi promotes Tim Lawlor to CFO and Jonathan Muller to SVP, Product and Technology, enhancing its executive team.
news.summary: A notable tech-enabled lender headquartered in San Francisco has recently appointed Tim Lawlor as Chief Financial Officer and Jonathan Muller as Senior Vice President of Product and Technology. This announcement was made on October 21, 2024. Kiavi, recognized for its lending services to residential real estate investors, emphasized the promotions of these two experienced individuals as part of their ongoing leadership strategy. Lawlor will now oversee financial operations, while Muller will lead the product and technology divisions. This move aims to further solidify Kiavi's position in the market and drive innovation within the company.

news.headline: GSE Solutions and Pelican Energy Partners increase merger consideration to $4.60 per share. Nasdaq: GVP.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland as of October 21, 2024, GSE Solutions, also known as GSE Systems, Inc. and traded on Nasdaq under GVP, disclosed its position as a prominent provider of advanced engineering solutions aiding the clean-energy generation and decarbonization efforts within the power sector. The company reported that it has...

news.headline: Toorak Capital Partners completes first RTL securitization of $166 million, backed by multifamily and mixed-use properties.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Toorak Capital Partners LLC revealed the successful completion of their first residential transition loan (RTL) securitization named Toorak Mortgage Trust 2024-2 (TRK 2024-2). This securitization is backed by loans secured by small balance multifamily and mixed-use properties. The initial portfolio for TRK 2024-2, totaling $166 million, included 98 R...

news.headline: Investment in NYS parks yields $10m in sales, now rivaling agriculture's economic impact.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Parks & Trails New York (PTNY), The Political Economy Research Institute (PERI), and The National Heritage Trust reveals that for every $1 million invested in New York State parks, it generates $10 million in sales. This research highlights the significant economic impact of investing in parks. The report also indicates that this investment contributes to the annual GDP of New York State, demonstrating the importance of funding for the parks sector.

news.headline: Studio Shed in Colorado wins housing grant, saving $240,000, offering discounts to customers on over 5,400 prefab projects.
news.summary: A reputable manufacturer of prefabricated structures based in Louisville, Colorado, Studio Shed, has revealed its plans to provide discounts and enhance efficiency for turnkey ADUs. With a track record of delivering over 5,400 prebuilt residential and commercial projects since its establishment in 2008, the company aims to offer a significant discount of $240,000 on its services. This move is expected to benefit customers seeking affordable and streamlined solutions for accessory dwelling units.

news.headline: Oakworth Capital Inc. sees 23% rise in year-to-date diluted EPS, reports $4.1 million net income in Q3 2024.
news.summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. - Oakworth Capital Inc. (OTCQX: OAKC) announced a significant rise in profitability thanks to balanced growth strategies. In the third quarter of 2024, the company reported a net income of $4.1 million. Year-to-date 2024 results were even more impressive, reaching $11.7 million, representing a notable 24% increase compared to the same period last year when it stood at $9.4 million.

news.headline: Blue Shield of California and Salesforce partnering to simplify prior authorizations with new platform, streamlining 20+ systems.
news.summary: A nonprofit health plan has developed a prior authorization platform using Salesforce Health Cloud which will integrate with physician systems to collect essential clinical data from electronic health records and simplify processes currently spread across over 20 systems. This initiative aims to provide efficient prior authorization for members and physicians, reducing delays and improving overall healthcare delivery.

news.headline: 30,000 enthusiasts join Dalian Marathon, igniting the city with passion on Oct. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Dalian, China, the 34th annual Dalian Marathon began at 7:30 on October 20, 2024, with an impressive 30,000 marathon enthusiasts taking part in the event. These participants eagerly raced past the starting line and proceeded to traverse the city streets, displaying their passion for running in the pleasant cool weather. Along their path, these runners were enthusiastically cheered on by supporters who lined the route.

news.headline: LRT Company fully subscribes $5 million ground lease DST offering near Hilton Head Island. Regulatory D private placement fully subscribed.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Hardeeville, South Carolina, LRT Company, a development firm specializing in Section 1031 investment offerings, revealed the successful completion of its Regulation D private placement offering, LRT Island Gateway 5 DST. The offering, which was all-cash, managed to reach full subscription.

news.headline: Duracell partners with Formula 1 Heineken Silver Las Vegas Grand Prix; to sponsor DRS Zone at the race in 2024.
news.summary: Las Vegas Grand Prix, Inc. revealed that Duracell, a prominent battery manufacturer, is set to be the official battery partner for the FORMULA 1 HEINEKEN SILVER LAS VEGAS GRAND PRIX 2024. This collaboration will see Duracell supporting a DRS Zone at the Las Vegas Strip Circuit™, a crucial part of the track allowing drivers to activate their drag reduction system for a competitive advantage. This partnership signifies the merger of high-speed innovation and top-tier performance at the event.

news.headline: Total Expert launches Engage SMS, allowing lenders to connect with customers in real time through compliant two-way conversations, driving loyalty and conversions.
news.summary: Minneapolis-based Total Expert, a top player in the financial services sector for customer engagement software, recently introduced Engage SMS. This specialized texting tool allows lenders to engage in compliant, real-time, two-way conversations with clients, fostering loyalty and boosting conversions. Engage SMS provides lenders with a convenient means to communicate using the highly popular medium of texting, enabling communication through various devices such as mobile phones, laptops, or desktops.

news.headline: Daktronics, Inc. is implementing a business transformation plan to accelerate growth and increase margins.
news.summary: The Business Transformation Office is leading efforts to drive strategic initiatives aimed at accelerating profitable growth. Their goal is to increase margins and achieve consistent returns on invested capital in the mid-to-high teens.

news.headline: Kolmar BNH, the manufacturer of HemoHim in South Korea, receives NAI classification from US FDA for Sejong plant.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, Kolmar BNH, the manufacturer of HemoHim, has recently received a No Action Indicated (NAI) classification for its Sejong plant after an inspection conducted by the FDA. This classification signifies that the plant was found to be in compliance with FDA standards.

news.headline: Seoul Court dismisses MBK-Young Poong's second injunction, upholding Korea Zinc's management defense.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, the Seoul Central District Court has dismissed a second injunction filed by MBK-Young Poong Group to suspend Korea Zinc's (KRX:010130) share buyback, aimed at gaining control of the company. This is the alliance's second unsuccessful attempt, following a previous dismissal of their initial injunction. The motive behind MBK-Young Poong's repeated injunction filings is to raise uncertainty around Korea Zinc's share buyback and instigate concern among stakeholders.

news.headline: CoinSwitch Co-Founder reports $75M transferred from WazirX to global exchanges after hack, using new dashboard.
news.summary: CoinSwitch has launched a new dashboard that monitors the transfer of funds from WazirX's revealed wallets. This tool provides real-time updates on the movement of assets, offering insights into the flow of funds from these wallets. It serves as a useful resource for users and investors to track the movement of funds, ensuring transparency and accountability. The dashboard showcases key data such as the amounts transferred, the frequency of transactions, and other relevant information related to the movement of funds from WazirX's disclosed wallets. This initiative aims to enhance visibility and monitoring of fund transfers in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: Global compound feeds and additives market valued at $508.1 billion in 2023, expected to grow at 3.8% to reach $636.0 billion by 2029, with Asia-Pacific leading at a 4.4% CAGR to reach $232.3 billion. Leading manufacturers include Charoen Pokphand Foods, ADM, ForFarmers, CHS, and AB Agri.
news.summary: The global compound feeds and additives market was valued at $508.1 billion in 2023, and is projected to increase at a growth rate of 3.8% from 2024 to 2029, reaching $636.0 billion by the end of the forecast period. Asia-Pacific was the leading region in 2023, attributed to the increasing demand for poultry and meat products. The Asia-Pacific market is estimated to grow at a CAGR of 4.4% through 2029, reaching $232.3 billion by the end of the forecast period.

news.headline: ŌURA unveils first Perimenopause Report using data from 100k female members, highlighting physiological changes pre, during, and post menopause.
news.summary: In San Francisco, ŌURA, known for its smart ring, has unveiled their inaugural Perimenopause Report during Menopause Awareness Month. Researchers at ŌURA analyzed data from over 100,000 female Oura Members in the early perimenopause, late perimenopause, and early postmenopause stages for a year. The study aimed to uncover physiological changes before, during, and after menopause, shedding light on this period of women’s lives.

news.headline: DUOS introduces Chat 2.0 at HLTH 2024, aiming to enhance care access for seniors with AI.
news.summary: A technology company based in New York, DUOS, has revealed the release of Chat 2.0 in a recent announcement. The upgraded version of their chat platform will be highlighted at the upcoming HLTH 2024 Conference. This unveiling is expected to attract significant attention and interest, with attendees getting a firsthand look at the new features and enhancements. The company is aiming to make a strong impression at the conference by showcasing the capabilities of Chat 2.0 to a broader audience.

news.headline: Business leaders rushing AI adoption, report by Stibo Systems warns of ethical concerns, need for training. Released Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report by a prominent master data management company based in Denmark, Stibo Systems, highlights the pressing need for training in responsible AI use. Released on Oct. 21, 2024, the report titled 'AI: The High-Stakes Gamble for Enterprises' emphasizes the lack of proper education around AI implementation. It points out that in the U.S., a significant number of enterprises are struggling due to this issue. This report underlines the importance of addressing this training gap to ensure the ethical and effective utilization of AI technologies.

news.headline: NPMA encourages Americans to prevent rodent infestations during Rodent Awareness Week as weather cools.
news.summary: Fairfax, Virginia - The National Pest Management Association (NPMA) is raising awareness about the significance of preventing rodent infestations as the fall and winter seasons approach. This initiative is part of Rodent Awareness Week, aiming to educate Americans about the risks associated with rodent presence in homes. NPMA underscores the importance of proactive pest control measures to safeguard properties and health.

news.headline: Digital Holdings secures $20 million equity reserve facility to boost growth, led by companies Colossus Media, LLC and Orange142, LLC.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Houston, Direct Digital Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRCT) announced its significant presence in the advertising and marketing technology sector. The company operates through subsidiaries such as Colossus Media, LLC ("Colossus SSP") and Orange142, LLC ("Orange 142"). As a leading player in the industry, Direct Digital Holdings continues to expand its reach and influence on the market.

news.headline: Ares Charitable Foundation supports Latino entrepreneurs with new initiative ELEVATE to address barriers and challenges.
news.summary: In New York, the Ares Charitable Foundation, a 501(c)(3) organization affiliated with Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES), has introduced a new program, ELEVATE. This initiative aims to aid Latino entrepreneurs in addressing obstacles and challenges they face. The foundation seeks to support Latino entrepreneurs who are contributing significantly to the economy by establishing businesses. ELEVATE is designed to address the specific needs of Latino entrepreneurs and provide assistance to promote their success in the business world.

news.headline: AEWIN showcases 2PIC solutions at SC24 from Nov. 19th to 21st, promising advanced cooling tech.
news.summary: AEWIN Technologies Co., Ltd, also known as AEWIN, a prominent company specializing in advanced network appliances and edge computing solutions, will be showcasing cutting-edge two-phase immersion cooling (2PIC) solutions at SC24 taking place from November 19th to 21st.

news.headline: El Diario to host 20th Annual EL Awards to honor 21 influential Hispanic men on Oct. 25, 2024, nominated by community.
news.summary: In New York, El Diario, the oldest Spanish-language daily newspaper, is set to celebrate the accomplishments of 21 influential Hispanic men during the 2024 EL Awards on October 25, 2024. This marks the 20th edition of the awards, where Latino men who have had a significant impact and act as inspirational figures for the upcoming generation will be acknowledged. The honorees are chosen through nominations from the community, with the final selection being made by El Diario's editorial staff. The event will showcase outstanding individuals contributing to the Hispanic community.

news.headline: Study finds Asparagopsis seaweed significantly reduces cattle methane emissions, correcting error in species used.
news.summary: On 01-Oct-2024, CH4 Global issued a news release via PRNewswire mentioning a study involving Asparagopsis taxiformis, but it was later clarified that the seaweed used was Asparagopsis armata. The research has been rectified by the researcher, and CH4 Global is revising its release accordingly.

news.headline: Tina H. Boogren's new book focuses on physical wellness for educators. Released by Solution Tree on Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: In Bloomington, Indiana on October 21, 2024, Solution Tree, a leading provider of K–12 professional development resources for educators, introduced a new release called Wellness Solutions for Educators™. This release aims to address the well-being of educators who frequently put others' needs before their own. This initiative signifies Solution Tree's commitment to supporting educators in prioritizing their own health and wellness.

news.headline: Nucor's Q3 2024 conference call featuring CEO Leon Topalian. Tune in to NYSE: NUE's earnings release. Join the webcast for insights.
news.summary: A live conference call hosted by Leon Topalian, Nucor's Chair, President, and CEO, will be held in connection with Nucor's third quarter earnings release. The call, scheduled for October 21, 2024, in Charlotte, NC, will be accessible to individuals interested in the company's financial updates and performance. Nucor Corporation, listed as NUE on the NYSE, is a leading steel producer. Participants can join to hear about the latest financial results and strategic outlook.

news.headline: Newly opened Four Seasons Hotel Rabat at Kasr Al Bahr in Morocco, a stunning ocean-side property with historic buildings and lush gardens.
news.summary: A stunning ocean-front property in Rabat, Morocco, features a mix of newly built and refurbished historic buildings surrounded by lush gardens. Situated just a few minutes away from the city's major attractions, this unique location blends modern energy with historical charm. This information was released on Oct 21, 2024, and showcases the allure of this property without specifying the exact location or source.

news.headline: Transamerica's survey shows pooled retirement plans boost savings for Americans. Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: Today, in Baltimore, on October 21, 2024, Transamerica disclosed findings from its inaugural survey of participants in shared retirement plans. This study highlights the significant impact of these collective plans in broadening access to retirement savings.

news.headline: Andros introduces Andros Arc™ - a transformative platform for provider network optimization in healthcare. NY, Oct 21, 2024.
news.summary: A cutting-edge provider network management platform called Andros Arc™ has been introduced by Andros, a well-known player in the industry. With expertise in this field, the company aims to revolutionize network management for healthcare organizations. The launch of Andros Arc™ is set to open up new opportunities and foster strategic growth for these organizations. This announcement was made on October 21, 2024, in New York. This development signifies a pivotal moment as it offers enhanced capabilities and solutions to streamline operations. It showcases Andros' commitment to driving innovation and efficiency in the healthcare sector. This move is expected to have a significant impact, given the company's established reputation and the increasing importance of effective network management in the industry.

news.headline: OverDrive launches Heights Press, a Cleveland-inspired imprint for middle-grade readers, available in school and public libraries.
news.summary: Launching on October 21, 2024, the new series Hickory Hollow is set to enthrall middle-grade readers with thrilling adventures. Exclusive access to the series will be provided through school and public libraries. OverDrive introduces Heights Press, a unique publishing imprint influenced by the dynamic nature of the literary world. This debut series aims to offer a fresh perspective and engaging narratives for young readers.

news.headline: Allegheny College launches $250M campaign for teaching, student experience, and economic dev. Already raised $125M.
news.summary: Allegheny College in Meadville, Pennsylvania unveiled a significant initiative for alumni involvement, having already surpassed $125 million in funds raised. On October 21, 2024, the college introduced its major $250 million fundraising drive, known as "In for Allegheny: Our Pathway Forward," marking it as the largest campaign ever conducted by the institution.

news.headline: Recently, a new board member was elected by employees.
Endeavor Bancorp reports Q3 2024 pre-tax income of $1.3M, net income of $924,000, loan growth, NIM expansion.
news.summary: Endeavor Bancorp reported net income of $924,000 in Q3 of 2024, up from $760,000 in Q2 of 2024 but down from $1,218,000 in Q3 of 2023. They had a provision for credit losses of $609,000 in Q3 of 2024, compared to $451,000 in Q2 of 2024. Total interest income increased to $10.2 million in Q3 of 2024. Net interest income was $5.9 million, up by 10.4% from the preceding quarter. Total assets increased to $655.3 million in Q3 of 2024 from $593.8 million in Q2 of 2024. Total loans outstanding increased to $538.4 million. Total deposits increased to $577.8 million. Shareholders' equity was $45.0 million. Tier 1 leverage ratio was 10.95%. The Bank accepted "reciprocal" deposits totaling $127.0 million. Tangible book value per share increased to $12.97. Board member Jillian Murrish resigned. The Bank saw record quarterly loan production, with robust loan growth and high quality lending opportunities. Reach https://www.bankendeavor.com/investor-relations to keep updated on EDVR news.

news.headline: Skuad, a global EOR, ranks as a leader in G2's Fall 2024 Reports for EOR and Contractor Management.
news.summary: In New York, Skuad, a worldwide employer of record, has been acknowledged as a top performer in multiple sections in the G2 Fall 2024 Reports.

news.headline: 60% of AI deployments in contact centers are low maturity, not driving business value or solving customer problems.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a recent AI Maturity Benchmark Report by UJET, a top provider of AI-driven cloud contact center solutions, revealed that 60% of AI deployments in contact centers are considered low maturity. These low maturity deployments were found to be ineffective in generating business value or addressing customer issues. This data sheds light on the challenges faced by organizations attempting to achieve results in their AI initiatives within contact centers.

news.headline: Barings aids Vance Street Capital in acquiring Pro-Vision, providing a senior secured facility for investment in MI company.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - Barings, a global investment manager, has disclosed its role as lead agent for a senior secured facility to back private equity firm Vance Street Capital's investment in Pro-Vision. Based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, Pro-Vision is a company focused on end-to-end mobile video solutions. They are known for creating customized video solutions for critical asset monitoring. Barings played a significant role in this financial arrangement supporting the investment deal.

news.headline: Reltio launches new release with AI features for customer experiences and security, focused on data unification.
news.summary: Headquartered in Redwood Shores, California, Reltio announced the release of its newest product, enhancing data unification solutions for multidomain MDM and customer 360 profiles. The update includes features to assist data leaders, such as dynamic segmentation with behavioral data and the availability of pre-trained LLM models for immediate individual and organization data matching. These advancements cater to the increasing need for improved data management solutions.

news.headline: "Biomea Fusion's BMF-219 gets "icovamenib" as INN approval, aims to study effects on beta cells."
news.summary: Icovamenib, an oral covalent inhibitor of menin, is currently undergoing clinical trials to assess its effects on insulin-producing beta cells. The compound has shown promise in potentially enhancing the function of these cells. The research aims to understand how Icovamenib may influence insulin production and secretion. This development marks a significant step in targeting insulin-related disorders.

news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies to join AI Drug Discovery Summit USA 2024. Dr. Van Hyfte from BioStrand will speak at the event.
news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. (IPA), a biotherapeutic research and technology company listed on NASDAQ as IPA, shared that Dr. Dirk Van Hyfte, the Head of Innovation at BioStrand, IPA's AI subsidiary, will be part of a Fireside Chat at the upcoming AI Driven Drug Discovery Summit USA 2024. This event is scheduled to occur at the Aloft Boston Seaport District Hotel in Boston, Massachusetts, from November 12 to November 14, 2024. Dr. Van Hyfte's participation highlights the company's engagement in cutting-edge AI-driven research in the pharmaceutical industry.

news.headline: OneVest launches configurable wealth management platform in US; enables personalized services for financial institutions, with several prominent customers already onboard.
news.summary: A prominent wealth management technology leader, OneVest, has introduced its platform capabilities in the United States. This highly customizable platform aims to empower financial institutions to enhance their wealth management services by providing a personalized and efficient client experience. Already, numerous well-known U.S. financial institutions have joined as customers, signaling a strong uptake of the offering.

news.headline: Inflection AI acquires Boundaryless to boost enterprise AI agent deployment; Boundaryless provides RPA to finance, healthcare industries.
news.summary: Inflection AI, based in Palo Alto, California, has recently acquired Boundaryless, a prominent Robotic Process Automation (RPA) company in Europe. This acquisition aims to facilitate the swift implementation of Inflection AI's AI agent technologies across various enterprises. Boundaryless is recognized for offering data transformation, automation, AI, and analytics services to a range of industries such as finance, energy, healthcare, and manufacturing. The acclaimed team at Boundaryless has extensive proficiency in AI and automation integration.

news.headline: 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT) to release Q2 fiscal 2025 earnings report; conference call planned.
news.summary: 8x8, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol EGHT and headquartered in Campbell, California, has announced the scheduling of its second-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings release and conference call. This event will provide stakeholders and investors with important financial information and updates on company performance.

news.headline: Amy Howe, FanDuel Group CEO, named 2024 American Gambling Awards C-Suite Executive of the Year for leading growth and innovation.
news.summary: A notable executive, Amy Howe, CEO of FanDuel Group, has been awarded the C-Suite Executive of the Year for the 2024 American Gambling Awards held in Charlotte, N.C. Howe assumed the position in 2021 and played a crucial role in the significant growth and innovation of the company amid a rapidly changing market. The American Gambling Awards, organized by Gambling.com Group Limited (Nasdaq: GAMB), recognize leading companies and executives in the industry.

news.headline: H&M celebrates 20 years of designer collaborations with limited re-releases of iconic pieces.
news.summary: H&M is honoring the 20th anniversary of its renowned guest designer partnerships, a program that has had a significant impact on the fashion industry. In celebration of this milestone, H&M is reintroducing its most iconic collaborative collections...
